title: Dashboard
subtitle: Your IT estate at a glance — Inventory, Access and Knowledge.

needsAttention.heading: Needs attention
needsAttention.allClear: All clear — no expiring grants, low stock or lost assets right now.
needsAttention.expiringGrants: {count, plural, one {# grant expiring within {days} days} other {# grants expiring within {days} days}}
needsAttention.criticalGrants: {count, plural, one {# active grant on critical applications} other {# active grants on critical applications}}
needsAttention.lowStock: {count, plural, one {# consumable at or below the reorder threshold} other {# consumables at or below the reorder threshold}}
needsAttention.inMaintenance: {count, plural, one {# asset in maintenance} other {# assets in maintenance}}
needsAttention.lost: {count, plural, one {# asset marked lost} other {# assets marked lost}}

assets.title: Assets
assets.assignedFooter: {count, plural, one {# currently assigned} other {# currently assigned}}

healthBar.ariaLabel: Asset health: {operational} operational, {transitional} in maintenance or storage, {inactive} out of service of {total} total.

donut.title: Assets by status
donut.empty: No assets yet — add your first and the breakdown shows up here.

recentActivity.heading: Recent activity
recentActivity.cardDescription: The latest changes to assets, access and stock — newest first.
recentActivity.empty: No activity recorded yet. Changes to assets, access and consumables will show up here.
recentActivity.errorBody: The API may be down or unreachable.
